zh.lifeSummary: 當Princess of Murom Mariya Yaroslavna於大約1232年出生在俄羅斯Владимирская ОбластьМуром時，她的父親Yaroslav Yurevich Duke Of Murom20歲，母親Mrs Yaroslav Duchess Of Murom19歲。她於1248年與Yaroslav Vasilievich在俄羅斯Владимирская ОбластьВладимир結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1297年享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Princess of Murom Mariya Yaroslavna于大约1232年出生在俄罗斯Владимирская ОбластьМуром时，她的父亲Yaroslav Yurevich Duke Of Murom20岁，母亲Mrs Yaroslav Duchess Of Murom19岁。她于1248年与Yaroslav Vasilievich在俄罗斯Владимирская ОбластьВладимир结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1297年享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mariya
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Alfonso, Carlos, Luis, Miguel, Beatriz, Blanca, Dorita, Eduardo, Elena, Gonzalez, Jaime.  Italian Salvatore.
topographic name meaning ‘coast, coastal area’, or a habitational name from a place called Marina.

variants.name: Marin
meanings: Originally a medieval French diminutive form of Marie , introduced to Britain in the Middle Ages. In some places it was taken as a pet form of Margaret or Margery . As a male name, it is an altered form of the Continental male name Marian, a derivative of Latin Marianus (from Marius ), but is now rarely, if ever, used. It was the birth name of the American film star John Wayne ( 1907–79 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Princess of Murom Mariya Yaroslavna was born about 1232, in murom, Vladimir Oblast, Russia, her father, Yaroslav Yurevich Duke Of Murom, was 20 and her mother, Mrs Yaroslav Duchess Of Murom, was 19. She married Yaroslav Vasilievich in 1248, in Vladimir, Vladimir Oblast, Russia. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1297, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Princess of Murom Mariya Yaroslavna est née environ 1232, à murom, Vladimirskaya Oblast', Russie, son père, Yaroslav Yurevich Duke Of Murom, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Mrs Yaroslav Duchess Of Murom, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Yaroslav Vasilievich en 1248, à Vladimir, Vladimirskaya Oblast', Russie. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1297, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Princess of Murom Mariya Yaroslavna um 1232 in murom, Vladimirskaya Oblast', Russland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Yaroslav Yurevich Duke Of Murom 20 und ihre Mutter Mrs Yaroslav Duchess Of Murom 19. Sie hat 1248 in Vladimir, Vladimirskaya Oblast', Russland Yaroslav Vasilievich geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1297 im Alter von 66 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Princess of Murom Mariya Yaroslavna è nata il circa 1232 nel murom, Vladimirskaya Oblast', Russia, sua padre, Yaroslav Yurevich Duke Of Murom, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Mrs Yaroslav Duchess Of Murom, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Yaroslav Vasilievich nel 1248, nel Vladimir, Vladimirskaya Oblast', Russia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1297, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Princess of Murom Mariya Yaroslavnaが約1232年にロシアВладимирская ОбластьМуромで生まれた時，父Yaroslav Yurevich Duke Of Muromは20歳，母Mrs Yaroslav Duchess Of Muromは19歳であった。1248年にロシアВладимирская ОбластьВладимирでYaroslav Vasilievichと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1297年に66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Princess of Murom Mariya Yaroslavna(이)가 대략 1232년 러시아 Владимирская Область Муром에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Yaroslav Yurevich Duke Of Murom(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs Yaroslav Duchess Of Murom(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1248년 러시아 Владимирская Область Владимир에서 Yaroslav Vasilievich(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1297년 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Princess of Murom Mariya Yaroslavna nasceu aproximadamente 1232, em murom, Vladimirskaya Oblast', Rússia, seu pai, Yaroslav Yurevich Duke Of Murom, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Yaroslav Duchess Of Murom, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Yaroslav Vasilievich em 1248, em Vladimir, Vladimirskaya Oblast', Rússia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1297, com 66 anos.

ru.Uglich, Yaroslavskaya Oblast', Russia: Углич, Ярославская область, Россия, Советский Союз
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Princess of Murom Mariya Yaroslavna родилась около 1232 г. в местности Муром, Владимирская Область, Россия, её отцу по имени Yaroslav Yurevich Duke Of Murom было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Yaroslav Duchess Of Murom, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Yaroslav Vasilievich в 1248 г. в местности Владимир, Владимирская Область, Россия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1297 г. в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Princess of Murom Mariya Yaroslavna nació aproximadamente 1232, en murom, Vladimirskaya Oblast', Rusia, su papá, Yaroslav Yurevich Duke Of Murom, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Mrs Yaroslav Duchess Of Murom, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Yaroslav Vasilievich en 1248, en Vladimir, Vladimirskaya Oblast', Rusia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1297, a la edad de 66 años.
